title: Access the dashboard after signing in
description: An authenticated user can sign in and reach the main dashboard home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Complete a task only after finishing checklist items
description: A user can add checklist items in a task workspace and complete the task only after all checklist items are finished.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /tasks
Create a new task with a unique title and valid details
Open the newly created task workspace
Add checklist items to the task
Mark all checklist items as complete
Complete the task
Verify the task is marked as completed

title: Sign in to reach the authenticated dashboard
description: A returning user can sign in from the auth page and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Create a task from the task list
description: A user can create a new task from the task page and see it appear in the task list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /tasks
Create a new task with a unique title and valid details
Verify the new task appears in the task list

title: Create a task from the tasks page
description: A user can create a task from /tasks and see the new task appear in the task list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open tasks
Open the task creation modal
Fill in the task title field with a unique task name
Fill in the task description field with a task description
Select a priority level
Fill a valid due date into the due date field
Submit the task form
Verify the new task is displayed in the task list

title: Create a new account and land on the dashboard
description: A new user can sign up from the auth page and reach the authenticated dashboard after submitting the form.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign up form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Edit an existing task from the task list

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /tasks
Create a new task with a unique title and valid details
Edit the newly created task with updated valid details
Verify the updated task appears in the task list

title: Edit an existing task from the tasks page
description: A user can open an existing task, update its details, and see the updated task information in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open tasks
Open an existing task for editing
Update the task title with a unique value
Update the task description
Select a different priority level
Submit the task form
Verify the updated task information is displayed

title: Delete a task from the task list
description: A user can delete a task from the task page and remove it from the list after confirming the action.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Navigate to /tasks
Create a new task with a unique title and valid details

Verify the deleted task no longer appears in the task list

title: Delete a task from the tasks page
description: A user can delete an existing task from /tasks and see it removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form

title: Prevent completing a task when checklist items remain open
description: A user cannot finish a task while checklist items are still unfinished, and the task remains blocked from completion.
category: Task Workspace with Checklist and Focus Timer

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open tasks
Open an existing task
Add a new checklist item
Try to complete the task
Verify the task remains incomplete
Verify a completion blocking message is visible

title: Save profile details and weekly availability
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can update their profile information and weekly work-hour availability and see the saved profile state reflected afterward.

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Fill in the username field with a unique username
Fill in the full name field with a unique full name
Add a work hour interval for a weekday
Add a work hour interval for another weekday
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile information is displayed
Verify the saved weekly availability is displayed
